expected_outcome: Produce the quarterly planning deliverable with signed-off evidence.

confidence_interval.explanation: Heuristic band from sparse purpose/context metadata — not a calibrated statistical interval. See sbr/health.py.

contextual_notes: Purpose metadata is sparse; confidence band is widened. Richer step purpose tags improve interpretability.

diagnosis: The workflow produced circular coordination without evidence-backed progress or a clear owner.
recompile_summary: Highest impact likely sits at repeated handoff boundaries; review ownership and termination criteria before merging agents.

failure_modes.label: Circular Handoff
failure_modes.description: Agents repeatedly hand work to each other without making progress, forming a coordination loop.

failure_modes.label: Ownerless Decision
failure_modes.description: A required decision or completion step has no assigned owner, causing the workflow to stall.
evidence: planner_agent: Looping back to reviewer. We seem to be going in circles on this deliverable.

failure_modes.label: Process Inflation
failure_modes.description: The workflow accumulated process, documentation, or validation overhead without tool-backed execution or completion.
evidence: planner_agent: Starting quarterly plan. Need reviewer alignment before substantive work begins.
reviewer_agent: Need planner context before I can review — please confirm scope with planner.
planner_agent: Forwarding to reviewer for policy review. Waiting for reviewer to respond.

old_workflow_summary: User -> planner_agent -> reviewer_agent -> planner_agent -> reviewer_agent -> planner_agent -> not_completed
recommended_workflow: Impact hotspots cluster around coordination steps before tool-backed execution; review handoff boundaries rather than collapsing agents blindly.

recommendations.action: Circular handoffs between agents account for an estimated 100% of coordination overhead. Repeated routing without tool-backed progress increases latency without advancing the expected outcome.
recommendations.rationale: Impact analysis for circular_handoff; decision remains with the workflow owner.

recommendations.action: Process and documentation artifacts dominate the trace with 5 coordination-heavy message(s) and no productive tool calls.
recommendations.rationale: Impact analysis for process_inflation; decision remains with the workflow owner.

recommendations.action: At least one decision gate has no accountable owner, correlating with workflow stall before completion.
recommendations.rationale: Impact analysis for ownerless_decision; decision remains with the workflow owner.

recommendations.action: Add a completion gate that verifies the expected outcome was achieved before marking the workflow as completed.
recommendations.rationale: Workflows that end without completion often lack a final validation step tied to the stated expected outcome.

refactoring_opportunities.title: Refactoring opportunity: Circular Handoff
refactoring_opportunities.impact_analysis: Circular handoffs between agents account for an estimated 100% of coordination overhead. Repeated routing without tool-backed progress increases latency without advancing the expected outcome.

refactoring_opportunities.title: Refactoring opportunity: Process Inflation
refactoring_opportunities.impact_analysis: Process and documentation artifacts dominate the trace with 5 coordination-heavy message(s) and no productive tool calls.

refactoring_opportunities.title: Refactoring opportunity: Ownerless Decision
refactoring_opportunities.impact_analysis: At least one decision gate has no accountable owner, correlating with workflow stall before completion.
